headline: Public copy cleanup: homepage and magazine entry copy now read like a travel editorial product, not an internal build log.
focus: Remove internal improvement language from public-facing pages while keeping the existing structure stable.
notes: Replaced internal phrases such as “we adjusted” and build-handoff language on the homepage with reader-facing travel editorial copy.
Cleaned the Magazine opener so it describes the city desk as a product experience, not a construction note.
Updated release-check and whats-new labels to v196 public copy readiness.
